title: Document Implement Verdict-First Review/Test Result Handling

Added a token-efficiency implementation note tying verdict-first control flow to the current compat warning path.
handoff_summary.remaining: Runtime prompt/template migration and eventual removal of REVIEW_TEST_VERDICT_COMPAT_MODE are still outside this documentation bead's scope.
handoff_summary.risks: Docs intentionally describe the current implementation with compatibility mode still enabled. If downstream work changes prompt requirements or removes compat mode, these sections will need a follow-up doc pass.
handoff_summary.next_action: Keep docs aligned if a later implementation bead disables REVIEW_TEST_VERDICT_COMPAT_MODE or tightens prompt-template verdict requirements.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Shared-risk runtime areas remain src/codex_orchestrator/scheduler.py finalize/verdict logic and tests/test_orchestrator.py review/test completion coverage. guardrails.template_text:
# Documentation Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Update documentation and examples that explain the assigned behavior without changing runtime feature behavior.

Allowed actions:
- Edit docs, examples, and explanatory text tied to the assigned bead.
- Align documentation with existing code and validated behavior.
- Identify when implementation or tests must land first and block with a handoff.

Disallowed actions:
- Change runtime behavior, production code paths, or feature logic.
- Invent undocumented behavior that is not present in the codebase.
- Approve code quality or test completeness as a substitute for review.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise documentation changes and remaining gaps.
- Accurate updated docs and clear next-agent recommendations when code changes are required first.
